notes: B4G3-Kanban board loads with 7 columns: Draft, Submitted, Approved, In Production, Quality Check, Quality Hold, Completed. All visible with correct headings and card counts.
B4G3-Deleted Draft order ORD-023 from detail page. Verified removal from Orders grid (not found), Workflows Kanban (not in any column), and Dashboard (not in recent orders).
B4G3-Cards on Kanban show order numbers (ORD-019, ORD-017, ORD-014, etc.) in card headers.
B4G3-Cards display product names: Polymer Coating Mix, Aluminum Frame B, Steel Bracket A, etc.

B4G3-Operator created order ORD-025 with all fields: Precision Bearing Unit, qty 500, High priority, Night shift, notes with long text. Review step showed all data. Detail page confirmed notes and shift displayed. Activity log shows creation entry.

B4G3-Operator created order ORD-026 with minimum required fields only (product, quantity, due date, production line). Optional fields (notes, custom shift) not filled. Order created without errors, detail page handles empty optional fields correctly.
B4G3-Cards show assigned user names (Eva Kralova, Petra Svoboda, Tomas Dvorak) — not raw user IDs.
B4G3-Dragged ORD-017 from Draft to Submitted via mouse drag. Success notification: 'ORD-017: Draft → Submitted'.
B4G3-Dragged ORD-017 from Submitted to Approved as Admin. Success notification: 'ORD-017: Submitted → Approved'.
B4G3-Logged in as Supervisor, submitted ORD-021 then approved via Approve button on detail page. 'Order approve successful' notification confirmed.
B4G3-Dragged ORD-019 from Submitted back to Draft as Admin. Success notification: 'ORD-019: Submitted → Draft' (rejection).
B4G3-Logged in as Supervisor, submitted ORD-022 then rejected via Reject button. 'Order reject successful' notification confirmed. Order returned to Draft.
B4G3-Dragged ORD-017 from Approved to In Production as Admin. Success notification: 'ORD-017: Approved → In Production'.
B4G3-Used 'Complete Production' action button on ORD-017 detail page. Notification: 'Order complete production successful'. Order moved to Quality Check.

retries.error: Drag-and-drop did not connect in headless mode. Retried via action button on detail page.

notes: B4G3-Clicked 'Mark Complete' on ORD-017 (Quality Check). Notification: 'Order complete successful'. Order moved to Completed.
B4G3-Clicked 'Quality Hold' on ORD-017. Notification: 'Order quality hold successful'. Order moved to Quality Hold column.
B4G3-Clicked 'Release' on ORD-017 (Quality Hold). Notification: 'Order release successful'. Order returned to Quality Check.
B4G3-Attempted invalid transition (approve on Draft order ORD-019) via API. Server returned 400: 'Cannot approve from status draft. Valid from: submitted'. Card stayed in Draft column.
B4G3-Noted pagination '24 total'. Created 2 new orders via wizard. Pagination updated to '26 total'. Total count correctly increased by 2.
B4G3-Operator sorted by Due Date ascending (3/5→3/6→3/12) and descending (6/1→5/10→4/25). Both sort directions working correctly.
B4G3-Searched 'Steel' on Orders page. 8 matching orders returned, all containing 'Steel Bracket A' product. Search filters grid correctly by product name.
B4G3-Started wizard as Operator, filled Step 1 and Step 2, navigated away without submitting. Order count unchanged (24 before and after). No orphan draft created.

B4G3-Admin attempted invalid transition (approve on already-approved ORD-022) — API returned 400. Then performed valid action (Start Production) — succeeded with 'Order start production successful' notification.
B4G3-Admin clicked 'Start Production' on Approved order ORD-014 detail page. Success toast shown. Navigated to Workflows, verified ORD-014 card now in 'In Production' column.
B4G3-Attempted to drag Completed order ORD-001 to Draft column. Card stayed in Completed column — not draggable. No error notification (drag rejected silently by UI).
